heading: Limitation on power of committee of Congress to consider projects
label: 568 Limitation on power of committee of Congress to consider projects
text: No project shall be considered by any committee of Congress with a view to its adoption, except with a view to a survey, if five years have elapsed since a report upon a survey of such project has been submitted to Congress pursuant to law.
notes: CodificationSection is from act , popularly known as the “Rivers and Harbors Appropriation Act of 1918”.Sept. 22, 1922
